info.title: BILL network operations
info.description:
BILL is a cloud-based cash flow management system for an organization's Accounts Payable (AP) and Accounts Receivable (AR) automation.
 * **AP**: Automate workflows to pay vendors bills at scale for the goods and services they provide. Pay vendors with a wide range of payment methods. Generate vendor credits, bill credits, and payment disbursement reports.
 * **AR**: Automate workflows to get paid by customers at scale for the goods and services you provide. Generate and send invoices on a schedule, generate customer and invoice credits, and seamlessly charge authorized customers.
 * **Organization**: Manage your bank accounts (for sending and receiving payments), users (with user roles), and sync with your choice of accounting software.

Integrate with the BILL API to send and receive payments for your business. See [Support Center](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us) for resources about using the BILL web app.

post.summary: Search BILL network for a customer or vendor
post.description:
Search the BILL network for a customer, vendor, or verified national vendor. You can filter your search by name, account number, or zip code.

**Note**: `/v2/NetworkSearch.json` returns a maximum of 25 results.

### What is the BILL network?
The BILL network is a collection of customer organizations and vendor organizations using BILL. Network connections between customers and vendors enable electronic payments between them.

Verified national vendors include water, power, cable, and phone companies and are part of the BILL verified national vendor network. The BILL network includes the verified national vendor network.

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

post.summary: Invite a customer or vendor in the BILL network
post.description:
Send an invitation to connect your organization with a customer or vendor organization in the BILL network.

The invitation is sent to the organization email address. If the invited organization does not respond, cancel the invite (with `/v2/CancelInvite.json`) before sending a new invitation.

**Note**: If an organization does not respond to an invitation for 60 days, the invitation expires.

### Prerequisites
This is an MFA protected endpoint. Create an MFA-protected API session with `/v2/Login.json` before using `/v2/SendInvite.json`.

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

post.summary: Invite a vendor not in the BILL network
post.description:
Send an invitation to connect your organization with a vendor organization not in the BILL network. If the invited vendor does not have a BILL account, they can open a subscription-free Basic Receivables account and add a bank account to receive payments.

The default BILL email invitation is sent to the organization email address. Use the BILL web app to customize your vendor invitation and to send a reminder to a vendor. See [Connect to a vendor and set up ePayments](https://help.bill.com/hc/en-us/articles/115005307443-Connect-to-a-vendor-and-set-up-ePayments) in the BILL Help Center for more information.

When the invited vendor sets up their BILL account, BILL connects this vendor with your created vendor. If the invited vendor does not respond, cancel the invite (with `/v2/CancelInvite.json`) before sending a new invitation.  

**Note**: If the invited vendor does not respond to an invitation for 60 days, the invitation expires.

### Prerequisites
This is an MFA protected endpoint. Create an MFA-protected API session with `/v2/Login.json` before using `/v2/SendVendorInvite.json`.

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

post.summary: Search BILL network for a verified national vendor
post.description:
Search the BILL network for verified national vendor organizations. You can filter your search by name, account number, or zip code.

In response, the `matchedOn` object states whether the search result is based on `name`, `accNumber`, or `addressZip`. 

### What is a verified national vendor?
Verified national vendors include water, power, cable, and phone companies and are part of the BILL verified national vendor network. The BILL network includes the verified national vendor network.

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

post.summary: Get payment addresses for a verified national vendor
post.description:
Get the list of payment addresses for a verified national vendor. In response, an `id` is returned for each payment address.

From the response, use the `id` that matches your vendor billing statment zip code to connect the verified national vendor as your vendor (with `/v2/ConnectLargeBillerAsVendor.json`).

### Verified national vendors
Verified national vendors include water, power, cable, and phone companies and are part of the BILL large biller network. These vendors can have multiple payment addresses based on zip code.

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

post.summary: Connect verified national vendor as your vendor
post.description:
Connect a verified national vendor as your vendor.

When the connection is successful, the verified national vendor information is linked to your created vendor and you can pay the vendor (with `/v2/PayBills.json`).

In your `/v2/ConnectLargeBillerAsVendor.json` request, set `largeBillerId` as the `id` (retrieved with `/v2/LargeBillerSearch.json`) that matches your vendor billing statement zip code.

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

post.description:
Get the status of an existing invitation sent using `/v2/SendInvite.json` or `/v2/SendVendorInvite.json`.

**Note**: If an organization does not respond to an invitation for 60 days, the invitation expires.

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

post.description:
Cancel an existing invitation sent using `/v2/SendInvite.json` or `/v2/SendVendorInvite.json`.

You can send a new invitation after an existing invitation is canceled.  

**Note**: If an organization does not respond to an invitation for 60 days, the invitation expires.

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

post.description:
Disconnect a customer organization (in the BILL network) from your organization.

**Warning**: This action cannot be undone. You can invite the customer again with `/v2/SendInvite.json`.

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

post.description:
Disconnect a vendor organization (in the BILL network) from your organization.

**Warning**: This action cannot be undone. You can invite the vendor again with `/v2/SendInvite.json`, `/v2/SendVendorInvite.json`, or `/v2/ConnectLargeBillerAsVendor.json`.

devKey.description: Developer key generated with your BILL developer account

accNumber.description:
Organization account number.
* Bank account number for customer or vendor
* Billing statement account number for verified national vendor

networks.description:
List of networks to search. You can search in one or both networks.
* Enter `0` for BILL network
* Enter `1` for verified national vendor network

forVendor.description: Search for a customer (`false`) or vendor (`vendor`)

response_status.description:
Response status.
* `0`: Success response
* `1`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

response_message.description:
Response status.
* `Success`: Success response
* `Error`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

showDisplayNameInNetwork.description: Set as `yes` if display name appears in the BILL network

type.description:
Network type.
* `0`: BILL network
* `1`: Verified national vendor network

networkId.description: Organization Payment Network ID (PNI). BILL uses the PNI to uniquely identify the customer or vendor in the BILL network.

addressZip.description: Address zip code (BILL network type only)

numberOfConnections.description: Number of existing BILL network connections

managedByName.description: Organization managed by name (BILL network type only)

managedByEmail.description: Organization managed by email (BILL network type only)

matchScore.description: Search result match score. Search results are ordered in the descending order of `matchScore`.

networkId.description: Payment Network ID (PNI) of the invited organization. BILL uses the PNI to uniquely identify the customer or vendor in the BILL network (retrieved with `/v2/NetworkSearch.json`).

id.description: BILL-generated ID of your customer organization (for receiving payments) or vendor organization (for making payments). Retrieve the `id` with `/v2/List/Customer.json` or `/v2/List/Vendor.json`.

response_status.description:
Response status.
* `0`: Success response
* `1`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

response_message.description:
Response status.
* `Success`: Success response
* `Error`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

requestId.description:
Invitation request ID.

You can use this ID to cancel your invite with `/v2/CancelInvite.json`.

vendorId.description: BILL-generated ID of your vendor organization account. The value begins with `009`. Retrieve the `id` with `/v2/List/Vendor.json`.

email.description: Email address of the invited vendor

response_status.description:
Response status.
* `0`: Success response
* `1`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

response_message.description:
Response status.
* `Success`: Success response
* `Error`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

response_data.description:
Invitation request ID.

You can use this ID to cancel your invite with `/v2/CancelInvite.json`.

accNumber.description: Billing statment account number for the verified national vendor

response_status.description:
Response status.
* `0`: Success response
* `1`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

response_message.description:
Response status.
* `Success`: Success response
* `Error`: Error response. Only `error_code` and `error_message` is returned in `response_data`.

name.description: Set as `true` if the search results are matched on organization name

accNumber.description: Set as `true` if the search results are matched on organization account number

addressZip.description: Set as `true` if the search results are matched on organization address zip

largeBillers.description: Array of verified national vendors that match the search query

id.description: BILL-generated ID of the verified national vendor. The value begins with `orv`.

billerReference.description: Unique numerical ID in the verified national vendor directory

lineOfBusiness.description: Two-character code of the verified national vendor. For example, `RB` is Remote Banking.

billerClass.description: Verified national vendor line of business

currency.description: ISO 4217 code for the currency that the verified national vendor accepts. For example, `840` is `USD`.

addresses.description: Array of addresses that match the verified national vendor

id.description: BILL-generated ID of the verified national vendor payment address. The value begins with `ora`.

largeBillerId.description: BILL-generated ID of the verified national vendor. The value begins with `orv`.

id.description: BILL-generated ID of the verified national vendor mask information. The value begins with `orm`.

largeBillerId.description: BILL-generated ID of the verified national vendor. The value begins with `orv`.

effectiveDate.description: Effective date in the YYYY-MM-DD format

exceptionMask.description: Set as `true` if the mask is an exception

largeBillerId.description: Verified national vendor ID returned with `/v2/LargeBillerSearch.json`

response_status.description:
Response status.

Verified national vendor ID (retrieved with `/v2/LargeBillerSearch.json`). The value begins with `orv`.

BILL-generated ID for your created vendor. The value begins with `009`.

When the connection is successful, the verified national vendor information is linked to your created vendor.

objectId.description: BILL-generated ID of the customer or vendor in your organization

status.description:
Network connection status.
* `0`: not connected
* `1`: pending
* `2`: connected
* `3`: Verified national vendor connected

requestId.description:
Invitation request ID (If `status` is `1` or `2`).

You can use this ID to cancel your invite with `/v2/CancelInvite.json`.

networkId.description:
Organization Payment Network ID (PNI). BILL uses the PNI to uniquely identify the customer or vendor in the BILL network.

This field appears in the network status response for invitations sent with `/v2/SendVendorInvite.json`.

logoUrl.description:
Organization logo URL.

This field appears in the network status response for invitations sent with `/v2/SendVendorInvite.json`.

id.description:
Invitation request ID generated with `/v2/SendInvite.json`.

For an invitation sent using `/v2/SendVendorInvite.json`, retrieve the invitation request ID with `/v2/GetNetworkStatus.json`.
